description_long: This is a rectangular wooden storage box constructed from dark-stained wooden planks, arranged horizontally with visible wood grain and natural imperfections. The box features open slats on all four sides and the bottom, allowing for airflow and visibility of contents. The corners are reinforced with thicker vertical wooden posts, and the structure is held together with small metallic fasteners at the joints. The interior is spacious and unobstructed, making it suitable for holding various items. The overall finish is matte, with a slightly rough texture typical of unfinished or lightly sanded wood. There are no visible handles, lids, or locking mechanisms, giving it a simple, utilitarian appearance.
description: A dark wooden slatted storage box with open sides and bottom, reinforced corners, and a matte, slightly rough finish. It is sturdy, spacious, and lacks handles or a lid.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open slatted design with three horizontal planks and reinforced corners.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the shorter width, vertical posts, and the open slatted construction.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the same horizontal slats and open structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side with visible wood grain and open slats.
